title: piper nigrum var. trioicum
intro: Piper nigrum var. trioicum, also known as long pepper, is a variant of the common black pepper plant, characterized by its longer, cylindrical fruit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Piper nigrum var. trioicum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
